text:
Once upon a time, in a small town nestled between rolling green hills and tranquil rivers, lived a curious five-year-old named Alex. Alex was known for their insatiable appetite for adventure. Every day, after finishing their daily chores, Alex would hop onto their trusty bicycle and pedal through the whispering forests and across meandering streams to places they’d never been before.

One sunny afternoon, Alex pedaled past the old oak tree where the town clock hung - its face always painted with the whimsical scenes of farm life. Eager to explore even further, Alex came upon an old stone path that branched into two, each leading to a dense thicket. “Shadows by the thicket!” Alex cheered, their heart filled with excitement.

Hoping to find a secret garden or a hidden glade, Alex chose the left fork. Inside the thicket lay a mystical forest unlike any other. The trees were taller than the oak tree in the clock tower, their leaves glowed
